title: Avrok's Armor
description: Makes most armor pieces invisible for a minimal look. Works with armor trims.  Inspired by Life Series, Empires, Hermitcraft, Misadventures.
body:
## Overview ## A minimal look without covering your skin. All armor pieces turn invisible besides the shoulders which where tweaked. Works with all armor trims and armor types.
![a row of armor stands with each different type of miencraft armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d95b10b9bf839b630ff8945097aabcb80740a554.png)
## Who is this for? ## Best suited for content creators, streamers, youtube videos, SMPs, public servers, RPG, PVP, personal play, survivial, hardcore, etc.
### Features: ### - Less armor texture - No mods needed - Trim compatibility
![a visual breakdown of the pack effects with markings pointing to armor that was turned invisible and one that was highlighted in green saying it was tweaked. Next to it is an armor stand with the full set of armor equipped and only showing the shoulders as a result of the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ceb36b980293c17eca9c0a3fa39246e82bb9f146.png)
![a row of armor stands with armor trims equipped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a8b72459525ad65a32396013fc04e2b5e2fb050.png)
